article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Feb 12, 2023 (BSS) - The Agriculturists Day will be observed in the country tomorrow through various programmes.

On this occasion, President M Abdul Hamid and Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina today issued separate messages extending greetings to agriculturists and wishing all programmes of the day a success.

Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujibur Rahman announced to upgrade the agriculturists to the class-I status in the government service on February 13, 1973 and in this perspective, observance of Feb

llm_connections.scope_justification: The quote explicitly advocates actions to avoid importing agricultural products (raw materials for industry) at the national level, matching the feature's aggregate import-volume scope.
